series_metadata.series_description: All Supplier Proposals including cost proposals received as a result of a Request for Proposal (RFP) or an Invitation To Bid (ITB).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Successful Proposals entire proposal(s) in BWC Procurement two (2) years contract begins original signed Cover Page or Cover Letter and move offsite storage two (2) years contract begins. original signed Cover Page or Cover Letter: Goods- length of contract ; Services- length of contract 9 years, shred. Non-Successful Proposals entire proposal(s) 1 year, shred. ; Electronic: Non-Successful Proposals entire proposal(s) 1 year Successful Proposals entire proposal(s) in Procurement UDS : Goods- length of contract ; Services- length of contract 9 years, delete. Non-Successful Proposals entire proposal(s) in Procurement UDS 1 year, delete
